Mason Day

Senior full-stack developer with nearly a decade of commercial experience. I build scalable web applications using Laravel, Vue 3, and TypeScript — from CMS platforms to SaaS products.

daymason@hotmail.co.uk GitHub Twitter

Projects

Novogamer Live

Community gaming platform for articles, reviews, and guides. Built on Laravel, Inertia.js, Vue, and TypeScript with AI-driven content discovery, vector embeddings, and queue-based architecture.

Bookbound Live

Personal library and book tracking platform. Users catalogue books via API or manually, write reviews, add notes, and organise their collection with a focus on clean UX.

SEO Toolkit Live

Lightweight, modular SEO tools for developers and marketers. Fast, practical utilities built for everyday workflows with emphasis on performance and simplicity.

SEO Toolkit 2 In development

Full site monitoring and SEO auditing SaaS. Monitors uptime, SSL, broken links, DNS, and performance across multiple sites — real-time dashboard, alerting, and team support.

Browser.is Live

Platform for small, fast web utility tools. Built as a foundation for rapidly developing and deploying single-purpose tools.

Skills

Backend
  • Laravel
  • PHP (modern OOP)
  • MySQL / PostgreSQL
  • Redis, queues, Horizon
Frontend

  • Inertia.js
  • TailwindCSS
  • Component-driven UI
CMS
  • WordPress
  • Custom themes & plugins
  • ACF
  • Headless CMS
Infrastructure

  • Apache / Nginx
